what_it_does: Stores YAML frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that points to a board item.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-6d6473ef.
The target is a board:// URI referencing item-0706dbb4.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-0706dbb4.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Represents a cross-reference via a URI-style target.
concerns: The file contains no payload or description of what is attached.
The board:// URI target is not resolvable from this file alone.
notes: A bare metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to a board item.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached?
What does board item item-0706dbb4 represent?
Why is the attachment type board_items rather than a more specific type?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file acts as a typed, timestamped attachment record, which matches its content.
intention_signals: To record that a channel memory attachment is associated with a specific board item at a specific time.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed reference connecting a channel attachment to a board item, which a fused system could use as a linkage node.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata stub for a dragnet-development channel attachment of type board_items targeting board item item-0706dbb4 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To capture a dated attachment-to-board-item reference in channel memory.
